underlying_goal: Create a fresh, interface-only PR for the rule_engine module derived from an existing PR, with proper commit conventions and a PR description
friction_detail: Claude initially began cherry-picking analysis when the user wanted fresh commits with a specific Jira-prefixed message format.
brief_summary: User wanted an interface-only PR built from existing PR #3 with Jira-prefixed fresh commits and a description; Claude created 20 header files in a single commit and generated the PR description, largely fulfilling the request.
